div.h1: FS Design: Directory as a Special File
div.h3: VFS Mapping of Logical Blocks to Physical Sectors (Inode i_mode Dispatch)

g.text: Byte Offset | Member Variable | Size | Interpretation
0x0000 | uint16_t i_mode | 2 bytes | S_IFDIR vs S_IFREG

ol.li: Uniform Block Handling: Disk hardware operates on 4KB physical sectors without knowledge of content type.
Metadata Contract: The Inode i_mode serves as the schema definition for all blocks associated with the inode.
Record Alignment: In Directory mode (B), records are aligned to 8-byte boundaries to facilitate direct memory-mapped access.
Bounds Enforcement: The i_size field defines the valid byte-range for the Raw Stream (A), preventing reading into uninitialized sector padding.

g.text: SCHEMA A: Regular File (Raw Byte Stream)

p.strong: Logical Format: No Internal Record Schema
